title: Combat Companion
description: A persistent tactical HUD for D&D 5e – action economy, ability scores, skills, conditions, reactions list, spells with slots, weapon attacks, saving throws, features & abilities, and more. v1.6.5: Fixed legacy action/bonus flags never cleared on turn change; fixed legacy action/bonus flags never read in _buildData (toggle was broken); fixed spell damage [object Object] in description popup; added full weapon damage fallback chain to popup; added weapon properties to popup; extracted shared _hasSpellAttack helper; removed duplicate _fmtDie fallback.
